name: Chocolate a L'orange Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate.
2. Beat the cream cheese in a large mixing bowl.
3. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
4. Add the cooled, melted chocolate and evaporated milk to the mixture and continue beating until smooth.
5. Stir in the orange juice concentrate; beat for 1 minute on medium high speed.
6. Pour into the prepared pie shell.
7. Freeze.
Note: For added zing, substitute an orange liqueur such as Cointreau, Grand Marnier, or Triple Sec for the orange juice concentrate. The first two are expensive, so this recipe gives me an excuse to buy the Grand Marnier and sample it while making the pie.
